TechApple Features: Mezzofy Recognized as 3-Star SME in 2024 Corporate Innovation Index

December 9, 2024•Mezzofy•News

The 2024 Corporate Innovation Index highlights accomplishments in innovation leadership and operational excellence, reinforcing Hong Kong's standing as a regional innovation center. Arup secured the top position, with Hang Seng Bank and Airport Authority Hong Kong following.

This marked the inaugural year SMEs received evaluation. Thirty-seven organizations achieved star ratings, with Mezzofy (Hong Kong) Limited earning three stars "for its digital couponing contributions."

Backed by the Hong Kong government and CUHK's APIB, the initiative promotes cross-sector collaboration and digital transformation. It furnishes data for policymakers while recognizing enterprises propelling economic progress through originality and adaptability.

The index continues encouraging enterprises of all dimensions to adopt innovative approaches and strengthen their competitive positions, establishing Hong Kong's trajectory as a worldwide innovation powerhouse.
